name: Chinese Egg Rolls 2
recipeIngredient: 10 Napa cabbage leaves, chopped (with ends removed)
1 package Egg roll skins or wrappers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all filling ingredients together and place the mixture in the freezer to cool.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a fryer to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. To roll: Place about 3 tablespoons of filling mixture in the center of an egg roll wrapper. Fold one corner over the mixture, then fold in the ends. Continue rolling until sealed. Brush the exposed corner of the wrapper with beaten egg to help seal the egg roll.
4. Fry the egg rolls in batches in hot oil for a few minutes on each side until golden brown. Remove and drain on paper towels.
5. Serve warm with soy sauce, hot mustard, or your choice of dipping sauce. Makes 18 egg rolls.
